ShortDescription.Value: Switch siren, vehicle engine, and ambient sounds with custom WAV/OGG files.

Publish.LongDescription:
Audio Switcher lets you replace siren, vehicle engine, and ambient sounds with custom WAV/OGG files and allows for custom public transport announcements for transport lines.
Supports local audio and modules.
* All-in-one audio overhaul: customize Sirens, Vehicle Engines, Ambient Sounds, and Public Transport announcements in one mod. * Clean, centralized options UI: organized tabs and status panels make setup and troubleshooting straightforward. * Per-category defaults + precision overrides: set broad defaults, then override specific vehicles, ambient targets, and transit lines. * Per-line transit announcements: assign distinct arrival/departure audio per discovered line for more realistic network audio. * Smart scanning tools: rescan custom audio folders and in-game prefabs/targets/lines to keep options synced to your city. * Advanced audio profile editor: tune volume, pitch, spatial blend, doppler, spread, min/max distance, loop, rolloff, random start, and fade timings. * Instant preview workflow: audition selected sounds before committing changes. * Reliable fallback behavior: define what happens when a selected file is missing, including alternate sound choices. * City Sound Sets system: create, activate, rename, duplicate, update, and delete full sound presets. * City-based automation: bind sound sets to cities and auto-apply the right set when loading each city. * Built-in diagnostics: live scan statuses, validation reports, and debug reporting help catch setup issues quickly. * Developer runtime audio tools: inspect and preview detected in-game sound sources with read-only SFX parameter visibility. * Module packaging workflow: build reusable audio modules from selected local assets. * PDX asset publishing pipeline: build-and-upload modules with visibility control, create/update modes, description, thumbnail selection, preflight checks, and dependency handling. * Safety-focused publishing UX: confirmation prompts, in-progress safeguards, and clear build/upload status feedback throughout.
CHECK OUT:
* New Improved Aircraft Sounds: https://mods.paradoxplaza.com/mods/139345/Any * LA/NY Siren Pack: https://mods.paradoxplaza.com/mods/139340/Any
Known issues: * Sound set may not always apply correctly if a save is renamed. * Changing some vehicles assigned to transport line may lead to dead prefab.

ChangeLog.Value: Fixed broken UI images, Fixed 'don't show again', Major performance pass
